titleStmt.title: SII 37.239: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 239. (A.R. No. B 332 of 1940-41.) Mēḍidinne, Jammalamaḍugu Taluk, Cuddapah District.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1351, Durmati, Śrāvaṇa ba. 8. Irregular.

It records a gift of land by Katti Bassavi-Nāyuḍu, son of Yerrama Nāyuḍu to the temple of Hanuman at Mēḍiguḍidinne. It also states that the temple was in dilapidated condition, so the donor renovated the temple and reconsecrated the image of god.
[Published Inscriptions of Andhra Pradesh: Cuddapah District, Part II, No. 60].

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakha
varṣaṁbulu 1351 Agunēṁṭi durmati saṁ
vatsara śrāvaṇa ba 8 lu . śrīmatu katti yarramanā
yani koḍku bassavi nāyaniṁgāru narasānā
yaniṁgārikiṁnni tama tallitaṁḍḍilu sugutra
gānu mēḍiguḍidiṁne hanumaṁtu tirukō
vilu khilamaivuṁḍagānu Aṁdku suṁnnapugā
rejēsi Āḷvāru punaḥ pratiṣṭa sēsi taruvātanu
Ānagarki Ācaṁdrārkkasthāyigānu putrapau
traparaṁpariyāṁ nagaru jītanaṁ śēsuka
mēḍiguḍidiṁnevūri vutaraṁ ciṁtala
cēni Āḍlacēnu lakkiśeṭi na cē
nu khaṁ . Akṣarālānu paṁdmu cēnuṁnnu Ācaṁ
drārkkasthāyigānu Aṣṭhabhōgatējasvāmya
na Anubhaviṁcuvāru . svadattā dviguṇaṁ
puṇyaṁ paradattānupālanaṁ paradattā
pahārēṇa svadattaṁ niṣpalaṁ bhavēt .
Digital edition of SII 37.239 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
